Figure 7: Subdivision of the rectangular domain into subregions, as considered in Section 7.4.
Figure 8: Sequence of nested meshes used in the numerical tests of Section 7.4, obtained via a meshagglomeration strategy from a fine triangular grid shown in the top–right panel.

Figure 3: (Left) Number of samples per level {Mℓ}6ℓ=1 needed to compute the MLMC-VE estimator EL[u] =∑L ℓ=1 EMℓ [wℓ] with L = 6 according to (55) with ε = 1e−10. (Right) Total number of samples ∑L ℓ=1 Mℓ needed to compute the MLMC estimator EL[u] for increasing L = 2, . . . , 6. Both figures are in semilog scale.
Figure 1: Sequence of non-nested Voronoi meshes used in the numerical tests of Section 7.1.
Figure 2: VE error for the QoI, |Q(uex)−Qh(uh)|, for p = 1, 2, 3.

Figure 5: MLMC-VE and MC-VE errors on E[u] in the H1(D) norm versus the computational complexity in loglog scale.
